title: Avoid using raw byte values in bitwise operations with shifts
description: In Java, using raw byte values in bitwise operations with shifts can lead to unexpected results due to numeric promotions and two's complement notation.
recommendation: Avoid using raw byte values in bitwise operations with shifts. Use appropriate data types to avoid unexpected results.
impact: Potential security vulnerabilities and unexpected behavior in code.

checks.message: Avoid using raw byte values in bitwise operations with shifts. Use appropriate data types to avoid unexpected results.
